configurations.name: sova-zahrada
runtimeArgs: cd / && python3 -c "from http.server import HTTPServer, SimpleHTTPRequestHandler; from functools import partial; import os; H = partial(SimpleHTTPRequestHandler, directory='/private/tmp/sova-zahrada-preview'); HTTPServer(('127.0.0.1', int(os.environ['PORT'])), H).serve_forever()"
